message:
feat: add budget reporting HTTP endpoint and wire into fcp-host

Expose live usage-budget snapshots from fcp-host via new POST
/rpc/budget/report endpoint. Supports optional zone filtering and
structured reporting with schema versioning.

New infrastructure:
- BudgetReportRequest and BudgetReportResponse types
- BudgetPolicyEngine::report() with optional zone filter
- HTTP handler and route in fcp-host binary
- Share BudgetPolicyEngine instance in AppState (was creating new)
- Add DoctorRequest Serialize derive for CLI output payloads
- Add fcp-telemetry workspace dependency to fwc

Tests: budget_policy_engine_report_all_zones_is_sorted,
budget_policy_engine_report_zone_filter_limits_output

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -26,6 +26,7 @@ fcp-host.workspace = true
 fcp-manifest.workspace = true
 fcp-mesh.workspace = true
 fcp-sandbox.workspace = true
+fcp-telemetry.workspace = true
 handlebars.workspace = true
 jaq-core = "2.2.1"
 jaq-json = { version = "1.1.3", features = ["serde_json"] }
